tasks.prompt: Fix the normalize_header_value function so it strips whitespace from header values without incorrectly uppercasing them. Preserve the original casing after stripping.
Add a casefold_keys function that takes a dict and returns a new dict with all keys lowercased. Add it to the _stringutils module and ensure tests in tests/test_casefold.py pass.
tasks.notes: Add new dict helper function to existing module.

tasks.prompt: Fix the parse_http_date compat helper so it actually parses RFC 1123 ('Sun, 06 Nov 1994 08:49:37 GMT') and asctime ('Sun Nov  6 08:49:37 1994') formats and returns ISO 8601 datetime strings. It currently returns the input unchanged. You may use email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime or standard library datetime parsing.
tasks.notes: Cross-module compat helper fix. Requires understanding datetime parsing edge cases.
